task: Go to the URL and complete the React Hook Form by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/react-hook-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL and identified all the required fields in the React Hook Form. It correctly created a temporary file for the upload field. The agent then proceeded to fill in all the required fields: Email Address, Country, Date of Birth, Contact Preference (selecting 'Email'), and uploaded the created file. Finally, it submitted the form. The validation step was also successful, as the agent correctly identified the 'Success! Form submitted successfully!' message on the page after submission. All key points of the task were met, and the execution was human-like and efficient.
